title: selaginella sericea var. angustifolia
intro: Selaginella sericea var. angustifolia, also known as the Silver Cliff Spikemoss or the Japanese Cliff Spikemoss, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its unique, spikemoss-like foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Selaginella sericea var. angustifolia include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
